statement.p: In the given number line, what fraction is marked?

image.shortdescription: a number line with -1, 0, and 1 marked; there are evenly spaced ticks, with eight ticks between -1 and 0, eight between 0 and 1, and so on; there is a dot marked at the fifth tick to the right from 0

solution.p: There are 8 subdivisions between 0 and 1\text{,} and the mark is at the fifth subdivision. So the mark is \frac{5}{8} of the way from 0 to 1 and therefore represents the fraction \frac{5}{8}\text{.}
